reviews.comment:
Fui a cargar alas 12 de la noche.. el playero un maleducado hacía esperar aproposito . Solo abrió 2 surtidores. Y se hacía el canchero
- el que quiera esperar q espere, sino que se valla ..  le decía a un hombre ..
Típico de empleado resentido!

(Translated by Google)
I went to fill up at midnight. The attendant was rude and deliberately made me wait. He only opened two pumps and acted like he knew everything. "If you want to wait, wait. Otherwise, leave," he told a man. Typical of a resentful employee!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzbWZmQUpBEAE
